sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Number of nodes: {len(nodes)}")

# Track key objects by color
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('M', 'p', 'O', 'W', 'S'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']}")

# Check last transition if available
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    before_colors = {n['color']: n['pixels'] for n in before}
    after_colors = {n['color']: n['pixels'] for n in after}
    print(f"\nLast action: {last_transition.action}")
    for c in set(list(before_colors.keys()) + list(after_colors.keys())):
        bc = before_colors.get(c, 0)
        ac = after_colors.get(c, 0)
        if bc != ac:
            print(f"  {c}: {bc} -> {ac} ({ac-bc:+d})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
